text.title: Multi-Agent Spec Build Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from task brief to a validation-ready multi-agent spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.code:
STEP 1 — Task decomposition input: task statement + acceptance criteria action: decompose into the minimum set of NON-OVERLAPPING roles (≤6); each role one cognitive verb output: draft roster (name + role only) gate: no two roles share ≥3 significant nouns
STEP 2 — Pattern selection input: roster + dependency notes between roles action: run content/06-decision-tree.xml output: pattern = sequential | parallel | hierarchical | debate | collaborative | conversational gate: pattern compatible with dependency DAG (parallel only if all roles independent; debate only if ≥3 agents with a judge)
STEP 3 — Model assignment input: roster + per-model cost matrix action: apply role-specialized-models — planners → opus, executors → sonnet, classifiers/formatters → haiku output: roster with model field gate: no opus on a sub-200-token classification step
STEP 4 — Message schema input: pattern + handoff data flow action: design structured JSON envelope with `schema_version=v1`, sender/receiver, payload, ts; payload is per-role-pair typed output: message_schema block gate: every field declared in the schema is referenced by ≥1 agent's system prompt
STEP 5 — Budgets + system prompts input: roster + total token budget action: assign per-agent token_budget + timeout_s (sum ≤ 90% of total budget; reserve 10% for orchestrator overhead); write system_prompt per agent stating role, forbidden actions, output schema output: complete agents[] with system_prompt + budgets gate: sum(agents[].token_budget) ≤ 0.9 × budget.total_tokens
STEP 6 — Termination + decision authority + validation input: full spec draft action: pick termination kind (max_turns for chats, shape_check for pipelines, predicate for DAGs); name decision_authority; run scripts/validate-multi-agent-basics.py output: validated multi-agent spec ready for implementation handoff gate: validator exits 0
